CR-2026-0841.surgeon_notes: Dr. Hayes — your case is fully GREEN across all five dimensions. Four preference card items to confirm at time-out: (1) Large-bore suction at incision, (2) Tourniquet at 300 mmHg, (3) Pulse lavage before cementing, (4) Coban wrap post-closure. Kyle Marsh from Zimmer Biomet will be present. Patient Margaret T. is fully prepped with zero outstanding flags.
